name: PT Yanaprima Hastapersada Tbk
summary: PT Yanaprima Hastapersada Tbk manufactures and exports polypropylene (PP) and polyethylene woven bags in Indonesia, rest of Asia, and internationally. The company operates through Plastic Bags, Cement Bags, Roll Sheet and Sandwich Sheet, and Others segments. It provides block-bottom bags for use in packaging cement, resins, and other bulk materials; PP woven bags for bulk material packaging; coated woven PP bags and woven PP bags laminated with kraft paper; and semi-finished products. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Yanaprima Hastapersada Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Hastagraha Bumipersada.
